user.title: Set up Wunderground PWS
user.description: Enter your Weather Underground station ID (e.g. IKAPOS27) and optionally your API key. If the API key field is left blank, the integration will attempt to discover it automatically. Optionally enter a forecast city to show a 7-day forecast on the HA weather card.

discover.title: Confirm API Key
discover.description:
Auto-discovery result: **{discovery_status}** (station: {station_id}).

Verify or correct the key shown below, or enter one manually if auto-discovery failed.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the WU API. Please check your station ID and API key.
error.api_key_required: The API key cannot be empty.

init.title: Wunderground PWS options
init.description: Clearing the API key field will trigger automatic re-discovery on the next integration reload.
